name: Fujita Kanko Inc.
summary: Fujita Kanko Inc. operates as a tourism company in Japan and East Asia. It operates hotels, wedding and banquet venues, restaurants, and resorts, as well as leisure facilities, such as theme parks, aquariums, and golf courses. The company also offers supplementary services, including hotel room cleaning, flower provision and arrangement, garden care and landscaping, and photography. In addition, it provides management services for resorts and urban condominiums, and property management services for land to be used for building villas. Fujita Kanko Inc. was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
